overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a rain-soaked cyberpunk urban environment at night, featuring neon-lit alleys, commercial stalls, and a metal cage structure with NPCs. The footage appears to be from a high-quality video game engine, showcasing atmospheric lighting and wet reflective surfaces.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, rain-soaked alleyway into a vibrant, neon-drenched urban corridor. It begins in the shadows beside green dumpsters, moving forward until it emerges into a brightly lit commercial area centered around a food stand bar. As the camera glides through a semi-covered vending zone filled with holographic advertisements, the environment shifts into a narrow alley defined by metal barriers and a large skull mural. The scene then opens further into a rain-slicked passage illuminated by glowing billboards and a prominent Real Water advertisement, before finally turning toward a concrete staircase leading upward.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sheltered commercial market into a wide, rain-soaked urban plaza centered around a metal cage. It begins by ascending concrete stairs into a covered market area filled with stalls before descending back to ground level and passing a neon sign for Hooch Heaven. As the camera exits the covered roofing, the scene opens into a wide alley where trash-strewn asphalt leads toward a prominent metal cage structure and wooden benches occupied by NPCs, including a person in a yellow plaid shirt. The camera then slows and circles the cage, weaving through views of the people trapped inside and observers in red pants sitting nearby. Finally, the view shifts as the camera glides past the occluding bars of the structure and turns to exit the plaza.
